label.purpose: Bespoke navigation elements and secondary metadata.

shadows.name: Tactile Glass Glow
shadows.value: 1px -1px 2px hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.5) inset, 0 -1px 2px hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.5) inset, -1px -1px 2px hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.5) inset, 1px 1px 2px hsl(0 0% 30% / 0.5) inset, -8px 4px 10px -6px hsl(0 0% 30% / 0.25) inset, -1px 1px 6px hsl(0 0% 30% / 0.25) inset, -1px -1px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 2px 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15), -2px -1px 2px hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.25) inset, 3px 6px 16px -6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)
shadows.purpose: Simulates glass thickness and physical shadows on cards.

motion.name: Standard Spring
motion.purpose: Used for fluid active indicator navigation bars.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Bold solid button for primary calls to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #F6F0DF; color: #223D27; font-family: monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 0.25em; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(246, 240, 223, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outline button for lower priority actions or secondary paths.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(246, 240, 223, 0.05); color: #F6F0DF; border: 1px solid rgba(246, 240, 223, 0.15); font-family: monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 0.25em; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(246, 240, 223, 0.1); border-color: rgba(246, 240, 223, 0.3); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Glass Container Card
components.description: Tactile curved glass layout container for sandbox widgets.
components.html:
VORTEX SANDBOX

Physics controls and OS layout simulations.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(34, 61, 39, 0.35); backdrop-filter: blur(2px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(2px); border: 1px solid rgba(246, 240, 223, 0.25); border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 1px -1px 2px hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.5) inset, 0px -1px 2px hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.5) inset, -1px -1px 2px hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.5) inset, 1px 1px 2px hsl(0 0% 30% / 0.5) inset, -8px 4px 10px -6px hsl(0 0% 30% / 0.25) inset, -1px 1px 6px hsl(0 0% 30% / 0.25) inset, -1px -1px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 2px 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15), -2px -1px 2px hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.25) inset, 3px 6px 16px -6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); transition: border-color 0.4s, background-color 0.4s, box-shadow 0.4s; } .ds-card-glass:hover { background: rgba(34, 61, 39, 0.45); border-color: rgba(246, 240, 223, 0.4); } .ds-card-title { font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: #F6F0DF; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #DEDBC8; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: The Forest Sanctuary is an editorial, print-inspired design aesthetic tailored for a high-fidelity software engineering showcase. The visual landscape is defined by a deep, atmospheric Forest Green background contrasted against a warm, literary Alabaster font. Large, structural serif headings create a rhythmic hierarchy, while negative space is treated as an active design element rather than a default empty container.

rules.name: The Forest Canopy Rule
rules.body: The global page background must always remain Forest Green (#223D27). High-contrast white (#FAFAF8) or pitch black (#141212) backgrounds are strictly restricted to isolated pop-up overlay panels (e.g., preview modals).

rules.name: The Maghfirea Statement Rule
rules.body: The display font Maghfirea is reserved exclusively for single-line statements and page titles. It must never be used for multi-line paragraphs or UI labels.

rules.name: The Ambient Response Rule
rules.body: Card surfaces are flat and flush at rest. Shadows, deep blurs, and hover scale transforms appear only in response to direct user interaction.

dos: Do maintain a strict 4.5:1 contrast ratio for body text by using Warm Alabaster (#F6F0DF) on Forest Green (#223D27).
Do restrict card rounding to a maximum of 24px to preserve a premium structured aesthetic.
Do implement standard spring-based easing for active transitions to support tactile responsive feels.
donts: Don't use standard SaaS card grids featuring a generic top icon, bold heading, and small body text.
Don't mix solid borders with large, heavy drop-shadows on cards (the ghost-card look).
Don't implement purple/blue neon gradients or standard glassmorphism as a default decoration.
Don't display sketchy SVG illustrations or hand-drawn graphics.
